description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with a modern, rectangular design and a flat roof. The facade is predominantly light gray with white accents, featuring symmetrical rows of windows on each floor. The building is surrounded by a low perimeter wall and includes a gated entrance facing the main road. There are several balconies on the upper floors, and the property is landscaped with small trees and grass patches. The structure appears to have four main stories above ground level, with a possible rooftop utility area. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, light gray apartment building with symmetrical windows, balconies, and a flat roof, surrounded by a low wall and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main gated entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and balconies facing the street.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the building's depth, additional windows, and landscaped greenery along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain facade with evenly spaced windows and no visible entrance or balconies.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting more balconies, the side entrance, and the continuation of the landscaped area.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in symmetrical, evenly spaced vertical and horizontal rows across all visible facades, contributing to a balanced and orderly appearance.
